agents.name: sim-runner
agents.role: Runs full 10-year simulation in a loop; writes run_complete markers

agents.name: ntfy-responder
agents.role: Receives NTFY messages from Rich; writes from_rich_*.md to staging
agents.last_action: Acked message: 'Start the full 2016-2025 run when GPU is free.'

agents.name: dispatcher
agents.role: Classifies inbound NTFY messages (URGENT/NORMAL/FYI) using Qwen

agents.name: session-watchdog
agents.role: Monitors Claude Code session alive; triggers restart if session dies

agents.name: staging-watcher
agents.role: Monitors docs/staging/ for new files; sends NTFY to alert CC
agents.produces: NTFY notifications on new staging files

agents.name: autonomous-runner
agents.role: Runs scheduled Claude Code sessions for background work

agents.name: discovery-agent
agents.role: Validates simulation assumptions against real UK market benchmarks
agents.last_action: Verified EDF + British Gas CSS EBIT% 2023-2024 from official PDFs — H confidence; built CSS_BENCHMARKS.md; updated ASSUMPTIONS.md Supplier Margin section with CSS-derived rows

agents.name: discovery-daemon
agents.role: Periodic research: validates simulation assumptions against real UK market benchmarks

agents.name: background-worker
agents.role: Runs background automation tasks (health checks, reporting, maintenance)

agents.name: epistemic-verifier
agents.role: Scans phase-close diffs for SIM/company epistemic barrier violations
